name: hub-and-spoke
title: Cross-Enterprise Hub-and-Spoke Communication with ZK Privacy
hypothesis: A hub-and-spoke model using the Basis Network L1 as hub can verify cross-enterprise interactions with recursive proofs, maintaining complete data isolation between enterprises while enabling verifiable inter-enterprise transactions with cross-enterprise message latency < 30 seconds and verification gas < 500K on L1.
null_hypothesis: The hub-and-spoke model cannot maintain complete data isolation while enabling verifiable cross-enterprise interactions, either because ZK proof overhead makes cross-enterprise latency impractical (> 5 minutes), or because the privacy model leaks enterprise-specific information through proof metadata or message patterns.

success_criteria.cross_enterprise_latency: < 30 seconds end-to-end for verified cross-enterprise message
success_criteria.l1_verification_gas: < 500K gas for cross-enterprise proof verification on L1
success_criteria.privacy_guarantee: Zero information leakage about enterprise-specific state (transaction values, balances, business logic) to other enterprises or the hub
success_criteria.atomic_settlement: Cross-enterprise transactions either complete fully or revert fully with 100% atomicity

depends_on: RU-L10 (Proof Aggregation -- ProtoGalaxy folding + Groth16 decider)
